indicators.name: dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is not suitable for computer work due to its size and lack of ergonomics.

indicators.name: chairs
indicators.rationale: The chairs are not designed for extended computer use and do not provide ergonomic support.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting is insufficient for extended computer work, as it is not bright enough to reduce eye strain.

indicators.name: no flat work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height to place a laptop or keyboard.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The dining table and chairs are not suitable for extended computer use, and there is no flat work surface. The lighting is insufficient for extended computer work. However, the presence of a window allows natural light to enter, which can help reduce eye strain.
